articles.headline: Club forced to play two matches in six hours, win both games
articles.description: If you hear Klopp or Pep moan about a fixture pile-up in the Premier League title race, spare a thought for Deportivo Lara boss Leonardo Gonzalez.

articles.headline: D.C. United signs Venezuela midfielder Junior Moreno
articles.description: The 24-year-old moves from Zulia in his homeland, where he scored two goals in 2017, for an undisclosed fee.

images.name: Junior Moreno 20170905 [1296x729]
images.credit: Junior Moreno played against Lionel Messi and Argentina in September.

articles.headline: Venezuela clubs honour protesters' deaths with minute of silence
articles.description: The players' timing caught everyone by surprise, including the TV cameras that could not edit out the coverage.

articles.headline: Armed men hold up bus carrying Venezuela's Trujillanos team
articles.description: Six armed men have held up a bus carrying a Venezuelan first division football team.

season.name: 2023 Primera División de Venezuela, First Phase
